prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog cover illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia stands in a library-search-command room holding a bright tool shaped like a search lens and AI prompt wand. Around her are three upgraded tools: "检索", "鉴别", "AI". The feeling is a personal survival guide for the information age.

Core meaning: in the AI era, information ability becomes a core weapon.

Style: clean Chinese blog illustration, white space, black/red/white, small blue information glow. Minimal labels: "信息能力", "会找", "会挑", "会用 AI".

Avoid fantasy battle violence, avoid giant title, avoid cluttered data storm.
